TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Narux psrahuq buuc = Kngkingal hngkawas na jiyax emusal idas maxal o ngalan jiyan knlangan, narux psrahuq buuc nii o ida dungus bi, yaasa maku mnarux, snliqan utux, ugat biyax dmanga nanaq ni mqriqu kndusan dnii, dungus bi smliq kndusan. Hmrinas hngkawas empitu kmxalan rima do, kiya bi saw rima seejiq do qulung niqan kingal ka narux psrahuq buuc nii, hana pracing o ini hari teura han, nawa saw llbu qtaan ka hnigan, embukaw dnii ka ini pntna, hbaraw seejiq o ini dha smmanu, ngalan dha saw mrudan ka, kiya bi mtakur, uxay uri o wada suqi kmbyaxan do, yasa knsrabang mangal sngqrqian buuc da. Uda phstur Tgkingal, spngun ka uuqun, kisa skbiyax ka buuc ta. Ida saw kngkingal hngkawas o mndka mangal ni iyux pskbiyax buuc saw yey-yow , dmudug dmuuy saw "Sara mu" , rngagi kngkingal uuqun namu o asaw ka niqan ksun saw 6大類 nii, kiya dungus bi ka mnangal yey-yow . Rahuq na duri o mumal pkrana quri saw skbiyax buuc uuqun da Kay-c ni wey-sen-su D ni tan-bay-c dnii, saw klgan mriku , empajiq ssama . Tgdha, "nganguc mratan" , Ni ga ini ta plahi. Yasa gdungus mgrbu n gbiyan o usa thidaw ciqih, kisa dungus bi spowda hidaw siida pskeudus saw Wey-sen-su D, ni 促進鈣質吸收, mumal saw skbyaxan , saw thuway tmalan, mgri, mkksa dgiyaq, 舉啞鈴操 dnii, peumal 骨密度和肌肉強度,ni iyux pskbiyax msblaiq ni mnsdka hiyi, mlih mangal sngqrqian buuc, kndusan o asaw ka ini hmguc puqan, mimah sinew, ini qtaqi keeman dnii. Tgtru, asi ta pkla ka saw ita nanaq yaa niqan quri saw骨鬆"風險因子". Nasi saw mnuda sngqrqian buuc ka rudan ta, saw ka sngqrqian buuc Quri 髖骨o, yasa musa niqan saw quri narux nii ka tntaxl uri, rahuq na o, mnkan saw iyu 類固醇 ni uga yahan ka qrijil, ga qrtan 卵巢 uxay uri o ini biyaw miyah ka 更年期, asaw ka dungus bi qmlahan buuc ta, iyux ta saw ini mhnux. Qtaan patas bnatas Embnatas patas :Lubi Pingaw Embatas :Kumu Basaw
S.PHON: = naɾux psɾaħuq buuʦ = kŋkiŋal ħŋkawas na ɟijax əmusal idas maxal o ŋalan ɟijan knlaŋan, naɾux psɾaħuq buuʦ nii o ida duŋus bi, jaasa maku mnaɾux, snliqan utux, ugat bijax dmaŋa nanaq ni mqɾiqu kndusan dnii, duŋus bi smliq kndusan. ħmɾinas ħŋkawas əmpitu kmxalan ɾima do, kija bi saw ɾima səəɟiq do quluŋ niqan kiŋal ka naɾux psɾaħuq buuʦ nii, ħana pɾaʦiŋ o ini ħaɾi təuɾa ħan, nawa saw llbu qtaan ka ħnigan, əmbukaw dnii ka ini pntna, ħbaɾaw səəɟiq o ini dħa smmanu, ŋalan dħa saw mɾudan ka, kija bi mtakuɾ, uxaj uɾi o wada suqi kmbjaxan do, jasa knsɾabaŋ maŋal sŋqɾqian buuʦ da. uda pħstuɾ tgkiŋal, spŋun ka uuqun, kisa skbijax ka buuʦ ta. ida saw kŋkiŋal ħŋkawas o mndka maŋal ni ijux pskbijax buuʦ saw jə-jow , dmudug dmuuj saw "saɾa mu" , ɾŋagi kŋkiŋal uuqun namu o asaw ka niqan ksun saw *** nii, kija duŋus bi ka mnaŋal jə-jow . ɾaħuq na duɾi o mumal pkɾana quɾi saw skbijax buuʦ uuqun da kaj-ʦ ni wə-sən-su d ni tan-baj-ʦ dnii, saw klgan mɾiku , əmpaɟiq ssama . tgdħa, "ŋaŋuʦ mɾatan" , ni ga ini ta plaħi. jasa gduŋus mgɾbu n gbijan o usa tħidaw ʦiqiħ, kisa duŋus bi spowda ħidaw siida pskəudus saw wə-sən-su d, ni ******, mumal saw skbjaxan , saw tħuwaj tmalan, mgɾi, mkksa dgijaq, **** dnii, pəumal ********,ni ijux pskbijax msblaiq ni mnsdka ħiji, mliħ maŋal sŋqɾqian buuʦ, kndusan o asaw ka ini ħmguʦ puqan, mimaħ sinəw, ini qtaqi kəəman dnii. tgtɾu, asi ta pkla ka saw ita nanaq jaa niqan quɾi saw**"****". nasi saw mnuda sŋqɾqian buuʦ ka ɾudan ta, saw ka sŋqɾqian buuʦ quɾi **o, jasa musa niqan saw quɾi naɾux nii ka tntaxl uɾi, ɾaħuq na o, mnkan saw iju *** ni uga jaħan ka qɾiɟil, ga qɾtan ** uxaj uɾi o ini bijaw mijaħ ka ***, asaw ka duŋus bi qmlaħan buuʦ ta, ijux ta saw ini mħnux. qtaan patas bnatas əmbnatas patas :lubi piŋaw əmbatas :kumu basaw
S.FORM: = Narux psrahuq buuc = Kngkingal hngkawas na jiyax emusal idas maxal o ngalan jiyan knlangan, narux psrahuq buuc nii o ida dungus bi, yaasa maku mnarux, snliqan utux, ugat biyax dmanga nanaq ni mqriqu kndusan dnii, dungus bi smliq kndusan. Hmrinas hngkawas empitu kmxalan rima do, kiya bi saw rima seejiq do qulung niqan kingal ka narux psrahuq buuc nii, hana pracing o ini hari teura han, nawa saw llbu qtaan ka hnigan, embukaw dnii ka ini pntna, hbaraw seejiq o ini dha smmanu, ngalan dha saw mrudan ka, kiya bi mtakur, uxay uri o wada suqi kmbyaxan do, yasa knsrabang mangal sngqrqian buuc da. Uda phstur Tgkingal, spngun ka uuqun, kisa skbiyax ka buuc ta. Ida saw kngkingal hngkawas o mndka mangal ni iyux pskbiyax buuc saw yey-yow , dmudug dmuuy saw "Sara mu" , rngagi kngkingal uuqun namu o asaw ka niqan ksun saw 6大類 nii, kiya dungus bi ka mnangal yey-yow . Rahuq na duri o mumal pkrana quri saw skbiyax buuc uuqun da Kay-c ni wey-sen-su D ni tan-bay-c dnii, saw klgan mriku , empajiq ssama . Tgdha, "nganguc mratan" , Ni ga ini ta plahi. Yasa gdungus mgrbu n gbiyan o usa thidaw ciqih, kisa dungus bi spowda hidaw siida pskeudus saw Wey-sen-su D, ni 促進鈣質吸收, mumal saw skbyaxan , saw thuway tmalan, mgri, mkksa dgiyaq, 舉啞鈴操 dnii, peumal 骨密度和肌肉強度,ni iyux pskbiyax msblaiq ni mnsdka hiyi, mlih mangal sngqrqian buuc, kndusan o asaw ka ini hmguc puqan, mimah sinew, ini qtaqi keeman dnii. Tgtru, asi ta pkla ka saw ita nanaq yaa niqan quri saw骨鬆"風險因子". Nasi saw mnuda sngqrqian buuc ka rudan ta, saw ka sngqrqian buuc Quri 髖骨o, yasa musa niqan saw quri narux nii ka tntaxl uri, rahuq na o, mnkan saw iyu 類固醇 ni uga yahan ka qrijil, ga qrtan 卵巢 uxay uri o ini biyaw miyah ka 更年期, asaw ka dungus bi qmlahan buuc ta, iyux ta saw ini mhnux. Qtaan patas bnatas Embnatas patas :Lubi Pingaw Embatas :Kumu Basaw
S.PHON: = naɾux psɾaħuq buuʦ = kŋkiŋal ħŋkawas na ɟijax əmusal idas maxal o ŋalan ɟijan knlaŋan, naɾux psɾaħuq buuʦ nii o ida duŋus bi, jaasa maku mnaɾux, snliqan utux, ugat bijax dmaŋa nanaq ni mqɾiqu kndusan dnii, duŋus bi smliq kndusan. ħmɾinas ħŋkawas əmpitu kmxalan ɾima do, kija bi saw ɾima səəɟiq do quluŋ niqan kiŋal ka naɾux psɾaħuq buuʦ nii, ħana pɾaʦiŋ o ini ħaɾi təuɾa ħan, nawa saw llbu qtaan ka ħnigan, əmbukaw dnii ka ini pntna, ħbaɾaw səəɟiq o ini dħa smmanu, ŋalan dħa saw mɾudan ka, kija bi mtakuɾ, uxaj uɾi o wada suqi kmbjaxan do, jasa knsɾabaŋ maŋal sŋqɾqian buuʦ da. uda pħstuɾ tgkiŋal, spŋun ka uuqun, kisa skbijax ka buuʦ ta. ida saw kŋkiŋal ħŋkawas o mndka maŋal ni ijux pskbijax buuʦ saw jə-jow , dmudug dmuuj saw "saɾa mu" , ɾŋagi kŋkiŋal uuqun namu o asaw ka niqan ksun saw *** nii, kija duŋus bi ka mnaŋal jə-jow . ɾaħuq na duɾi o mumal pkɾana quɾi saw skbijax buuʦ uuqun da kaj-ʦ ni wə-sən-su d ni tan-baj-ʦ dnii, saw klgan mɾiku , əmpaɟiq ssama . tgdħa, "ŋaŋuʦ mɾatan" , ni ga ini ta plaħi. jasa gduŋus mgɾbu n gbijan o usa tħidaw ʦiqiħ, kisa duŋus bi spowda ħidaw siida pskəudus saw wə-sən-su d, ni ******, mumal saw skbjaxan , saw tħuwaj tmalan, mgɾi, mkksa dgijaq, **** dnii, pəumal ********,ni ijux pskbijax msblaiq ni mnsdka ħiji, mliħ maŋal sŋqɾqian buuʦ, kndusan o asaw ka ini ħmguʦ puqan, mimaħ sinəw, ini qtaqi kəəman dnii. tgtɾu, asi ta pkla ka saw ita nanaq jaa niqan quɾi saw**"****". nasi saw mnuda sŋqɾqian buuʦ ka ɾudan ta, saw ka sŋqɾqian buuʦ quɾi **o, jasa musa niqan saw quɾi naɾux nii ka tntaxl uɾi, ɾaħuq na o, mnkan saw iju *** ni uga jaħan ka qɾiɟil, ga qɾtan ** uxaj uɾi o ini bijaw mijaħ ka ***, asaw ka duŋus bi qmlaħan buuʦ ta, ijux ta saw ini mħnux. qtaan patas bnatas əmbnatas patas :lubi piŋaw əmbatas :kumu basaw
